l1: This discipline is under active development — probing commands will be added by the Storage and High Availability tech lead.
To contribute diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced probing will be added by the Storage and High Availability tech lead.
To contribute advanced diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Get-ClusterNode | Select Name,State,NodeWeight' to confirm Failover Cluster node health and voting configuration.

l1: This discipline is under active development — troubleshooting steps will be added by the Storage and High Availability tech lead.
To contribute resolution steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Get-VirtualDisk | Where HealthStatus -ne Healthy | Select FriendlyName,HealthStatus,OperationalStatus' to identify degraded virtual disks.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced troubleshooting will be added by the Storage and High Availability tech lead.
To contribute advanced resolution steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Repair-VirtualDisk -FriendlyName <name>' to initiate Storage Spaces repair after a disk failure.

l1: This discipline is under active development — data collection steps will be added by the Storage and High Availability tech lead.
To contribute data collection commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Get-StoragePool | Out-File C:\storage_pools.txt' and 'Get-VirtualDisk | Out-File C:\virtual_disks.txt'
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced data collection will be added by the Storage and High Availability tech lead.
To contribute advanced collection steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Get-ClusterLog -Destination C:\ClusterLogs\' to collect full Failover Cluster diagnostic logs from all nodes.
